1. there is no base agent key! all keys are created at session start -- if it serves recovery we can derive the nsec by mgmt_private_key+session_id so we don't need to store any nsec other thant the mgmt_private key and we can always derive what's the nsec just by resuming a session (i.e. `tenex-edge launch --session <session-id>` or `claude --resume <session-id>` would have everything we need (i.e. "session_id") to recover the nsec.
